original: Wu MeKuan, a collection of 48 Zen koans, compiled in China

Catholic conspiratorGuy Fawkesattempts to blow up King James I and the British Parliament in the Gunpowder Plot. The plot is discovered, and Guy Fawkes is caught, tortured, and later executed along with seven others. Celebrated ever since as Guy Fawkes Day, his effigy is traditionally burned on a bonfire, accompanied by fireworks.
